vocab.meaning: người đọc sách nhiệt thành/say mê
vocab.example: I have been an avid reader since childhood, often finishing a novel in a single sitting.

vocab.meaning: khuynh hướng thoát ly thực tế qua văn học
vocab.example: For me, reading fantasy novels is a form of literary escapism that allows me to forget my daily stresses.
I gravitate towards non-fiction books because I find them more intellectually stimulating than light fiction.

vocab.meaning: sự khao khát/ham muốn vô độ đối với cái gì
vocab.example: He has a voracious appetite for historical biographies, consuming several volumes every month.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm hiểu biết/nhận thức
vocab.example: Reading diverse genres helps me broaden my cognitive horizons and understand different cultural perspectives.

vocab.meaning: người yêu sách/người sưu tầm sách
vocab.example: As a dedicated bibliophile, my personal library has grown so large that it now occupies an entire room.
Classic literature often provides profound insights into the human condition that are still relevant today.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm/mê mải vào một cuốn sách
vocab.example: There is nothing I enjoy more than losing myself in a book on a rainy Sunday afternoon.

vocab.meaning: đáng để suy ngẫm/gợi suy nghĩ
vocab.example: The author’s latest essay is incredibly thought-provoking, challenging many of my preconceived notions.

vocab.meaning: làm giàu vốn từ vựng của bản thân
vocab.example: Consistent reading is undoubtedly the most effective way to enrich one's vocabulary in a natural context.
